about.p1: I am very passionate and competitive, with leadership and teamwork skills. I can quickly learn anything I set my mind to. I like to stand out, I am very respectful, communicative, optimistic, perfectionist, and able to work under pressure and stress.
about.p2: I am currently looking for new exciting projects to carry out as a web developer. With solid experience in creating attractive and functional websites from pre-processing to launch, I am committed to providing customized solutions that meet the specific needs of each client.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer - Growing Network
experience.description: I develop and maintain web applications for the public sector using Laravel, React and MySQL. I have worked on key tax management systems for the Department of Bolívar (Colombia). I have also participated in the development of mobility projects for different transit offices of the Government of Bolívar, as well as for the Transit Office of Girón (Santander). I have also collaborated on document management solutions for healthcare institutions. Additionally, I participate in projects focused on livestock management and associated tax administration.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer - CulturaSoft S.A.S
experience.description: I participated in the maintenance and refactoring of methods and queries to improve performance in native projects with PHP 7.4 and JavaScript, achieving response times up to 50% faster. I managed databases with PostgreSQL and MySQL, optimizing queries and table structures for better performance. I provided technical support, solving problems and improving system stability to ensure an optimal user experience. I built dynamic modules in new projects with Angular seamlessly connecting to PHP APIs using the Slim framework. I developed new APIs from scratch with Golang, demonstrating my versatility and ability to adapt to different programming languages. I collaborated using Azure DevOps for agile project management, including task tracking, sprint planning, and team collaboration.

experience.title: Document Assistant & Data Analyst - Asmet Salud EPS
experience.description: I participated in the company's database reengineering by migrating the database from Excel to MySQL, and provided technical and document support in the Risk and Contracting sector.

projects.title: Stationery Store
projects.description: Inventory control for the management of a stationery store.

projects.title: Real Estate
projects.description: Real estate sales management, sales reports, prices, sellers and properties.
